subject: Bump nbi staging to 5.0.1 and sync ExtAPI-305 from master
commit_message:
Bump nbi staging to 5.0.1 and sync ExtAPI-305 from master

Change-Id: I6b4880aff8a96617768aeb5fa6efa8350ab38d39
Issue-ID: EXTAPI-311
Signed-off-by: aosull01 <adrian.osullivan@huawei.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 2 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Update nbi staging with 5.0.1-latest and sync EXTAPI-305 changes from master to staging

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab.com 2: Chained-CI build started, max time: 10800 seconds

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 5 on the queue.
